calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-03-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-03-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for settlement conference hearing this day in Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: V.Mack, Reporter: None
Appearances:
Arnold Evje, Esq., for Plaintiff City Housing, Inc.
Richard Midgett, Defendant in Pro Per.
Parties met with Judge Pro Tem Henry Shain in Dept. 305A. The case settled and the parties entered into a settlement agreement. Parties did not request terms of settlement be read into the record.
